refentry.refsect1:
&reftitle.description;
public static voidZookeeper::dispatch
The Zookeeper::dispatch method calls the callbacks passed by operations like Zookeeper::get or Zookeeper::exists.
Since version 0.4.0, dispatch must be called manually to achieve asynchronous operations. If you want that to be done automatically, you also can declare ticks at the beginning of your program.
After PHP 7.1, you can ignore this method. This extension uses EG(vm_interrupt) to implement async dispatch.

&reftitle.errors;
This method emits PHP warning when callback could not be invoked.

&reftitle.seealso;
zookeeper_dispatch Zookeeper::addAuth Zookeeper::connect Zookeeper::__construct Zookeeper::exists Zookeeper::get Zookeeper::getChildren Zookeeper::setWatcher
